purpose: Compute the first admissible mesh GCI for S13 exchange-CV QOIs by a stationary-terminal-window reframe that removes the same-absolute-time blocker for steady QOIs.
scope: S13 seeded right-leg exchange-CV QOIs (Q_wall + 3 recirculation proxies) across the existing coarse/medium/fine Jin meshes for Salt2/3/4; read-only; no release/freeze/score.
open_questions_for_user: Approve the stationary-window equivalence argument as an admitted same-QOI mesh-UQ basis for the thesis (needs independent review)?
Sample PASSIVE-H2 qambient / loop mdot at the coarse/medium/fine stationary windows to extend mesh-UQ to those QOIs?
